*** 1 FATAL, 1 INJ *** TEENAGERS RECREATING IN WATER NEAR A WATERFALL WERE SWEPT DOWNSTREAM BY A RAPID RISE IN THE WATER LEVEL. ONE TEENAGER DROWNED. ANOTHER ESCAPED THE FLOOD WATERS WHILE SUSTAINING MINOR INJURIES AND WAS LATER RESCUED.
